summary: Frontend testing of Vastgoed Kiosk module - 3 fixes verified: 1) Direct redirect after login (no intermediate page), 2) Beheerder/Uitloggen buttons more visible with bg-slate-100, rounded-xl, border styling and icons, 3) Building2 icon above login form title. All 8 tests passed (100% success rate).

test_results.building_icon_above_login_title: PASS - Orange Building2 icon displayed above 'Inloggen' title on login form
test_results.direct_redirect_after_login: PASS - After login, user is redirected directly to /vastgoed/{company_id} kiosk page
test_results.no_intermediate_page_buttons: PASS - No 'Open Kiosk' or 'Admin Dashboard' buttons visible after login
test_results.beheerder_button_visible: PASS - Beheerder button has bg-slate-100, rounded-xl, border styling with Settings icon
test_results.uitloggen_button_visible: PASS - Uitloggen button has bg-slate-100, rounded-xl, border styling with LogIn rotated icon
test_results.beheerder_button_works: PASS - Clicking Beheerder navigates to admin dashboard
test_results.uitloggen_button_works: PASS - Clicking Uitloggen clears token and redirects to /vastgoed login
test_results.auto_redirect_when_logged_in: PASS - Visiting /vastgoed while logged in auto-redirects to kiosk page

features_tested: Building/house icon (Building2) displayed above 'Inloggen' title on login form
After login on /vastgoed, user is redirected directly to /vastgoed/{company_id} kiosk page
No intermediate 'Welcome back' page with 'Open Kiosk'/'Admin Dashboard' buttons
Beheerder button on kiosk welcome page has visible styling (bg-slate-100, rounded-xl, border, Settings icon)
Uitloggen button on kiosk welcome page has visible styling (bg-slate-100, rounded-xl, border, LogIn icon)
Beheerder button navigates to admin dashboard
Uitloggen button clears token and redirects to login page
Visiting /vastgoed while logged in auto-redirects to kiosk page
critical_code_review_comments: CompanySelect.jsx correctly shows Building2 icon above login form title (line 324-326)
CompanySelect.jsx correctly navigates directly to kiosk page after login (line 110)
CompanySelect.jsx correctly auto-redirects logged-in users to kiosk page (line 34)
KioskWelcome.jsx Beheerder button has proper styling: bg-slate-100 rounded-xl border (line 62)
KioskWelcome.jsx Uitloggen button has proper styling: bg-slate-100 rounded-xl border (line 70)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 fixes verified working: 1) Direct redirect after login to kiosk page (intermediate page completely removed - only shows loading spinner while redirecting), 2) Building2 icon above login form title, 3) Beheerder/Uitloggen buttons on Kiosk Welcome page have visible styling (bg-slate-100, rounded-xl, border, icons). Admin Dashboard also has Uitloggen button in header. Tuya circuit breaker API is MOCKED in backend.

mocked_apis.note: Tuya circuit breaker API in kiosk.py is MOCKED
